nodes.text: From royalty pools to your bank account — the complete mechanics of streaming income.

Many artists receive streaming payments without understanding the calculation behind them. The process involves multiple steps, several parties, and two distinct royalty types. Understanding it helps you verify you're receiving everything you're owed.
~70% (Spotify) or ~73% (Apple Music) allocated to rights holders.
Your streams ÷ all platform streams = your % of the pool.
Label, distributor, and publisher cuts reduce the gross amount.
Your distributor or label pays you on their schedule.
Independent artists who write their own music are owed both royalty types. Failing to register with a PRO and publisher means leaving 10–20% of your streaming income uncollected.
All streams count equally. Mega-artists dominate the pool. Indie artists with small but loyal fanbases earn less per fan engagement.

Each subscriber's fees go to the artists they personally listened to. Rewards loyalty over volume. Tidal and SoundCloud have experimented with this model — and it would benefit most independent artists.
Estimate your streaming revenue across multiple platforms simultaneously.
Use our free calculator to estimate your potential income based on your numbers.
Free tool · No sign-up required · Instant results
Why do streaming royalty rates differ between platforms?

Each platform has different subscription pricing, advertiser revenue, subscriber counts, and royalty pool allocation percentages — all of which combine to produce different effective per-stream rates.
How do I make sure I'm receiving all my streaming royalties?
Register your songs with a PRO (ASCAP, BMI, PRS), sign up with a music publisher or publishing administrator, and use a reputable distributor who provides transparent reporting.
What is a royalty pool and how does it work?

A royalty pool is the total amount set aside from platform revenue for distribution to rights holders. It grows as subscriber counts and platform revenue grow, but so does the denominator (total streams), keeping per-stream rates relatively stable.

Understanding streaming revenue calculation helps you verify you're collecting everything you're owed. Register everywhere, choose the right distributor, and build the audience in premium markets that maximizes your share of the growing global streaming royalty pool.
